# RflowZ

> RflowZ is an AI-powered research proposal writing platform for students, academics, and research teams. It helps users create structured research proposals with AI-assisted writing, Mendeley citation import, customizable templates, and export to DOCX, PDF, and PPTX.

## Official URLs

- Website: https://rflowz.com
- App (sign up / login): https://app.rflowz.com — temporarily unavailable during system migration
- Terms and policies: https://rflowz.com/terms-and-policies

## Service status

app.rflowz.com is temporarily not working while the platform is being migrated. Login and sign up are unavailable until the migration is complete.

## Who it is for

- Undergraduate and postgraduate students writing research proposals
- Academic researchers and supervisors
- Research teams preparing grant or thesis proposals

## Core features

- AI-assisted research proposal writing
- Mendeley citation import and reference management
- Customizable research proposal templates
- Auto reference generation and academic formatting
- Export to DOCX, PDF, and PPTX (plan-dependent)
- Free plan available on registration (no credit card required)

## Pricing plans (monthly / annual)

| Plan | Monthly | Annual | Proposals/mo | Exports/mo | Watermark | PPTX |
|------|---------|--------|--------------|------------|-----------|------|
| Free | $0 | $0 | 2 | 2 | Yes | No |
| Starter | $3.99 | $3.29 | 10 | 30 | No | No |
| Standard | $5.99 | $4.99 | 30 | 50 | No | Yes |
| Professional | $9.99 | $7.99 | Unlimited | Unlimited | No | Yes |

Paid plans include a 5-day free trial. Annual billing offers a discount.

## Frequently asked questions

Q: Is there a free plan?
A: Yes. New accounts start on the Free plan with 2 proposals, limited AI assistance, and 2 watermarked exports per month.

Q: Does RflowZ integrate with Mendeley?
A: Yes. Users can connect Mendeley and import citations into proposals.

Q: What export formats are supported?
A: DOCX and PDF on all eligible plans. PPTX export is available on Standard and Professional plans.
